case_title: ALEXANDER JOHAN BUYTENDIJK VS. MARINA GREEN PROPERTIES

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUYTENDIJK, ALEXANDER JOHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARINA GREEN PROPERTIES $6,018.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,083.00, PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO A REFUND OF SECURITY DEPOSIT IN THE AMOUNT $5,150.00, OVERPAID RENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,388.00 AND ACKNOWLEDGES HIS RESPONSIBILITY FOR DAMAGE TO ONE OF DEFENDANT'S STOVES IN THE AMOUNT OF $520.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,018.00 FILED BY BUYTENDIJK, ALEXANDER JOHAN AS TO DEFENDANT MARINA GREEN PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SEE SIGNATURE- SERVED JAN-13-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARINA GREEN PROPERTIES
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2016 ORDERED DESTROYED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MARINA GREEN PROPERTIES
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUYTENDIJK, ALEXANDER JOHAN AS TO DEFENDANT MARINA GREEN PROPERTIES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MARINA GREEN PROPERTIES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
